calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing Of Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Oct-02-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Giselle Roohpraver, Esq. (415-638-4800) of Miller Starr Regalia for Petitioner/opposing party Jeff Kennedy.
Fredrick Crombie, Esq. (415-772-5759) of Cablentz Patch Duffy & Bass LLP for Defendant/ Moving party LAWRENCE KATZIN.

The Court announces the issue of attorney's fees on this motion. Both sides submit to the tentative ruling. Defendant raises the issue on confirming and entering judgment.The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT LAWRENCE KATZIN's Hearing Of Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award is GRANTED. Non-opposition filed. Additional attorney's fees are granted in the amount of $3,300. Order is signed in open court.(see scanned order for details)Parties to submit a proposed Judgment by Moday. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Hearing Of Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Sep-28-2015 Continued To Oct-02-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Kenneth Styles, Esq.(415-638-4800) of Miller Starr Regalia for Plaintiff/ Petitioner/ opposing party .
Frederick Crombie, Esq. (415-772-5759) of Coblentz Patch Duffy & Bass LLP for Defendant/Respondent/ Moving party LAWRENCE KATZIN.

The Court announces the tentative ruling and informs parties no opposition has been received. Both sides Argue. Defendant requests a short continuance. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT LAWRENCE KATZIN's Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award is continued to October 2, 2015 at 9:30 am. Both sides waive notice. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

Amended Notice Of Petition To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Aug-11-2014 Continued To Aug-26-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFFS JEFF KENNEDY and JON PETERSON's Amended Petition To Compel Arbitration is continued to August 26, 2014 to give opposing party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Opposing party must deliver courtesy copies of the opposition papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than August 11, 2014 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be granted. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the moving and reply papers. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976

Notice Of Petition To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Jun-30-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONERS JEFF KENNEDY, JON PETERSON'S Petition To Compel Arbitration is off calendar. The court did not receive a courtesy copy of the motion in compliance with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B or a proof of service. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
